bullet_changes.original_text: Automated weekly reporting pipeline in Python, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week
bullet_changes.revised_text: Automated weekly reporting pipeline using Python and Docker, saving 6 hours of analyst time per week and improving data consistency with PostgreSQL

bullet_changes.original_text: Cleaned and joined claims data across 4 disparate sources (1.2M patient records) using pandas and SQL
bullet_changes.revised_text: Integrated and cleaned claims data across 4 disparate sources using pandas, SQL, and MongoDB, resulting in a unified dataset of 1.2M patient records

bullet_changes.original_text: Presented findings to clinical leadership; model was piloted in 2 hospital units
bullet_changes.revised_text: Deployed a predictive model using FastAPI and Git, presenting findings to clinical leadership and piloting the model in 2 hospital units with Node.js and React for visualization
